Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is taken under submission.

Visiting Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR# 13714 415-601-7054 apourtabib@gmail.com, Reported (301/BZ)

**AFTER HEARING, COURT ADOPTS ITS TENATIVE RULING OVERRULING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER. ORDER IS SIGNED.**
